earnings.assumptions: Estimate reflects durable 2000s-pop streaming, recurrent playlist placement, and mixed writer/producer participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master ownership with artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split across writers and producers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled from long-tail catalog behavior and not from public royalty statements.
